delete.title: Delete device

provisioning.title: Configure device
provisioning.browserOkDesc: Connect the ESP32 via USB before continuing.
provisioning.browserFailDesc: Web Serial API requires Chrome or Edge. Safari and Firefox are not supported.
provisioning.browserFailHint: Open this page in Chrome or Edge to use USB provisioning.
provisioning.step1: Connect the ESP32 to the USB port
provisioning.step3: Click "Send" and select the serial port
provisioning.step4: Press EN/RESET on the ESP32 — the device will configure itself
provisioning.selectPort: Select the serial port. Then click "Connect" and immediately press EN/RESET on the device and wait
provisioning.resetAlert: ⚠ Press EN/RESET on the ESP32 now
provisioning.doneDesc: The device will restart and connect to the network in seconds.

ota.title: Firmware update
ota.description: Send an over-the-air firmware update to this device.
ota.noHardwareModel: No hardware model assigned to this device template.
ota.noVersions: No firmware versions available for this device.
ota.triggered: OTA update triggered. The device will download and apply the new firmware.

provisioning.title: Provision Devices
provisioning.subtitle: Connect unclaimed devices via USB Serial
provisioning.noDevicesDesc: Create a device first to get a claim token, then connect it via USB to provision it.
provisioning.browserUnsupportedDesc: Web Serial API is only available in Chrome and Edge. Please use one of these browsers to provision devices via USB.

hero.subtitle: Connect sensors, relays and actuators. AI configures everything. Just describe what you need and sell IoT solutions to your clients.

flow.title: How does it work?
flow.subtitle: Three steps. No code. No complicated configurations.

flow1.title: 1. Connect
flow1.desc: Connect sensors and actuators to an ESP32. AI detects the hardware and generates the configuration.

flow2.title: 2. Flash
flow2.desc: One click and the firmware loads onto the ESP32 via USB. The device connects to the internet.

flow3.title: 3. Control
flow3.desc: Real-time dashboard with temperature, relays, automatic rules. All from your browser.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: One platform, infinite possibilities. From home automation to smart agriculture.

f1.title: 11 supported sensors
f1.desc: DHT22, BME280, PIR, HC-SR04, DS18B20 and more.

f2.title: Actuators
f2.desc: Relays, servos, RGB LEDs, buzzers, water pumps.

f4.title: Real-time alerts
f4.desc: Notifications when something goes out of range.

f5.title: OTA updates
f5.desc: Update firmware on all your devices over WiFi.

ai_demo.prompt: I have an ESP32 with DHT22 sensor, a 7-relay module, and I want relay 1 to activate when temperature exceeds 30°C.
ai_demo.response2: GPIO14 → DHT22 · GPIO23 → Relay 1 · Rule: temp ≥ 30°C → relay 1 ON
